title: What To Expect From SoundHound AI Inc (SOUN) Q4 2024 Earnings
text: SoundHound AI is scheduled to announce Q4 2024 results on February 27, 2025. Analysts anticipate quarterly revenue of $33.69 million with earnings per share of -$0.10. For the full year 2024, the company is expected to report revenue of $83.84 million and losses of -$0.38 per share. Forecast estimates show slight adjustments over the past 90 days. Full-year 2024 revenue guidance has marginally decreased to $83.84 million, while 2025 projections have declined from $165.39 million to $165.26 million. Notably, 2025 earnings expectations have improved, moving from -$0.26 to -$0.25 per share. In the previous quarter ending September 30, the company exceeded expectations. It reported revenue of $25.09 million against estimates of $23.02 million, representing a 9.01% beat. Earnings came in at -$0.06 per share, surpassing the anticipated -$0.074 by 18.92%. Despite the positive surprise, the stock declined 17.06% following the announcement. Seven analysts tracking the stock have set an average 12-month price target of $13.36, suggesting potential 50.50% upside from the current $8.88 level. Consensus recommendation rating stands at 1.9, indicating 'Outperform' status.
